scripts.build: rm -rf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc --build tsconfig.json && node scripts/generate-build-info.mjs && chmod +x dist/bin.js
scripts.cli:dev: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; bun src/bin.ts "$@"' --
scripts.cli:built: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; node dist/bin.js "$@"' --
scripts.format:check: biome check package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
scripts.format:write: biome check --write package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json vitest.config.ts src test scripts
